figures.caption: Figure 1: Global occupancy grid (rightmost), robot localization in 3D environment(second image), local occupancy grid boundaries and robot localization (third image) and finally path execution (fourth image).

Figure 2: Diagram from [2]modifiedwith the enhancedCondDBC pipeline with the key differences being the model 𝜙 noised predicted action and ground truth action inputs and conditioned by the state 𝑠. The BC model 𝜋 takes 𝑠 as input, predicts an action 𝑎, a BC loss LBC closes the gap between 𝑎 and 𝑎 directly. Also, 𝑎 and 𝑎 are noised and fed through the FiLM conditioned model 𝜙 where the margin between the loss output from both inputs is minimized through LDM .
